sub_modules.fp_mult_unpack: Extracts IEEE-754 sign, exponent, significand, and special-case flags for both operands.
sub_modules.fp_mult_exp_product: Computes the effective exponent sum and 24x24 significand product.
sub_modules.fp_mult_normalize: Normalizes the 48-bit product and extracts guard, round, and sticky bits.
sub_modules.fp_mult_round: Applies round-to-nearest-even and produces the packed fraction and adjusted exponent.
sub_modules.fp_mult_pack: Applies IEEE-754 special-case priority, overflow, underflow, and final result packing.
